creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to Alex Kozlov from comment #7)
> While you're preparing your mail, can you please test this patch?
> Just put it into ports/x11-servers/xorg-server/files/

Actually, I sent three emails already on the same day. Maybe, check your spam folder on the email server. They have the same topic name.

I don't have issues with devd, because I don't use it for configuring input devices for xorg server. This was a whole point of this bug report. In the email messages I explained the configuration of xorg server, and the requested logs (with DEVD option enabled: 1) Option "AutoAddDevices" "off"; 2) Option "AutoAddDevices" "on" and 3) without DEVD).
